description_long: This is a dark, flared ceramic vase with a wide mouth and a slightly tapered base. The exterior is adorned with hand-painted motifs in earthy tones, including stylized animal figures and geometric bands, suggestive of traditional or folk art influences. The surface appears matte with some visible wear, giving it an aged, slightly weathered look. The interior is deep and shadowed, indicating a hollow form suitable for holding items or liquids. The painted decorations are primarily in ochre, red, and yellow, standing out against the dark background. The overall craftsmanship and ornamentation suggest it could serve as a decorative piece in a public or semi-public urban setting.
description: A dark, flared ceramic vase with hand-painted animal and geometric motifs in earthy tones, featuring a wide mouth and a matte, weathered finish.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from above, highlighting its wide, flared mouth and the dark, shadowed interior.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the curvature of the vase and reveals more of the painted motifs along the upper rim.
description_view_2: A side view showing the full height of the vase and a clear depiction of the animal motif and geometric bands.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, focusing on the lower half and additional painted details, with the mouth partially visible.
